app.name: Breakflow
app.heroSubtitle: Steal a moment of relaxation in the busy gaps.
app.heroDescription: Choose the perfect way to unwind based on your rhythm.

home.focusModeHint: Pomodoro + White Noise, get into flow
home.strategySubtitle: Dynamic recommendations based on local holidays, commute, and work rhythm.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro
pomodoro.desc: Stay focused and take breaks efficiently.

calendar.title: Moyu Calendar
calendar.desc: Check holidays, lunar dates, and fortunes.

memo.title: Memos
memo.desc: Track your daily todos and ideas.

textWorkbench.title: Text Workbench
textWorkbench.desc: A unified workspace for current and future text tools.

textBatchReplace.rulesPlaceholder: One rule per line: old => new
textBatchReplace.error: Replace failed. Check rule format or regex syntax.

textDiff.title: Text Diff
textDiff.desc: Compare two text versions with line-level highlights.
textDiff.empty: Please input at least one side of text.

textFormatter.title: Text Formatter
textFormatter.desc: Batch clean text format with rule-based actions.

csvToolkit.title: CSV Toolkit
csvToolkit.desc: Parse CSV locally, map columns, and export JSON or CSV.
csvToolkit.sourcePlaceholder: Paste CSV text or upload a CSV file...
csvToolkit.error: Parse failed. Please check CSV format.

imageQuickEdit.title: Image Quick Edit
imageQuickEdit.desc: Resize and convert image format locally.
imageQuickEdit.emptyList: No image list yet. Upload image or folder first.

memo.title: Memos for {date}
memo.empty: No memos yet. Write something down...
memo.retention: Data is kept for 30 days max. Please backup important info.
memo.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this memo?

views.gamesDesc: Low-pressure mini play sessions for quick mood recovery.
views.relaxDesc: Gentle interactions for stress relief between tasks.
views.toolsDesc: Practical utilities for focus and light productivity.
views.readingDesc: Read local books in a calm, focused flow.
views.emptyGameDesc: We are preparing global-ready game experiences.
views.emptyRelaxDesc: Recharge experiences are currently being localized.
views.emptyToolsDesc: More globally useful tools are coming soon.

whiteNoise.name: White Noise Mixer
whiteNoise.description: Blend ambient tracks for focus, commute, and winding down.

mixes.title: Saved Mixes
mixes.emptySub: Activate some sounds and save them here.
mixes.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this sound mix? This action cannot be undone.

help.title: How to use Ambience Mixer
help.toggleDesc: Click on any sound card to toggle it on or off. You can combine multiple sounds to create your perfect atmosphere.
help.volumeDesc: Use the slider on active sound cards to adjust their individual volume levels.
help.saveDesc: Go to "My Mixes" and click "Save Current Mix" to save your current combination. Give it a name to easily find it later.
help.globalDesc: Sounds continue playing even if you close this modal or navigate away. Use the "Stop All" button in the header to silence everything at once.

settings.globalPlaybackDesc: Keep sounds playing when leaving this page

about.title: About Us
about.description: For global workers: Instant play, privacy first, and seamless transition.
about.missionDesc: To create a lightweight relaxation platform designed for workers, helping you recharge during brief breaks.

features.title: Core Features
features.instantDesc: No complex loading, play instantly anywhere, anytime.
features.privacyDesc: No registration required, local storage, we respect your data.
features.adaptiveDesc: Perfectly fits desktop and mobile screens, providing a consistent experience.
features.freeDesc: Core features are promised to be free forever.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Your voice matters, help us improve.
feedback.contactPlaceholder: Email or other contact info for our reply
feedback.error: Submission failed, please try again later.

seo.defaultDescription: Breakflow is a free online micro-break platform for professionals. No download required. Features Pomodoro timer, White Noise, Wooden Fish, and Pixel Fishing to help you recharge and refocus.

home.description: The ultimate online break companion. Access stress-relief games and productivity tools instantly. Privacy-first mode for safe work breaks.

games.description: Free online browser games for quick breaks. Play Pixel Fishing and clicker games without installation. Perfect for reducing work stress.

relax.description: Online relaxation tools: Digital Wooden Fish, Virtual Pet. Gentle interactions to relieve anxiety and boost mental wellness.

tools.description: Best online productivity tools: Customizable Pomodoro timer, Ambient White Noise mixer, Daily Horoscope. Enhance your workflow state.

focus.description: Fullscreen Focus Mode: Pomodoro + ambient noise mixer + calming sci-fi waveform animation to help you stay in flow.

notFound.description: Page not found. Return to Breakflow home to discover more free online relaxation tools.

settings.title: Settings
settings.bossKeyDesc: Quickly switch to work interface in emergency.

bossKey.title: Stealth Mode Settings
bossKey.danmakuDesc: Show floating ticker on top while using modules.
bossKey.hotkeyDesc: Press Esc to switch to stealth workspace instantly.
bossKey.camouflageDesc: Choose what appears when stealth mode is triggered.
bossKey.tipsDesc: Use Esc when interrupted, press Esc again to return.

share.title: Share
share.subtitle: Share this break app with your community.

privacy.title: Privacy & data choices
privacy.desc: We use local settings and optional analytics only with your consent (GDPR/CCPA aligned).

usageReminder.title: Take a short break
usageReminder.desc: You have been active continuously. Stretch, hydrate, and rest your eyes.

voice.unsupported: Voice control is not supported in this browser.

auth.otpSent: Verification code sent. Please check your email.
auth.registerOtpSent: Registration code sent. Check your email and enter it to finish sign up.
auth.cloudbaseHint: CloudBase is enabled. If registration fails, enable Email provider in console first.
auth.subtitle: Sync your progress across devices
auth.loginRequired: You need to log in to use this feature.
auth.checkEmail: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm your account.

profile.title: Account Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage nickname and password. Nickname is used for danmaku display
profile.emailReadonly: Email (used only for auth and event records)
profile.fillResetFields: Please enter reset code and new password
profile.resetCodeSent: Reset code sent. Please check your email
profile.resetLinkSent: Reset email sent. Complete reset via email link

notification.updateDesc: ✨ New features detected. Click to refresh!
